use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR TREATING HEART FAILURE IN A HUMAN USING A CRYSTALLINE FORM OF IVABRADINE HYDROCHLORIDE

indications.text:
1.1 Heart Failure in Adult Patients
Corlanor is indicated to reduce the risk of hospitalization for worsening heart failure in adult patients with
stable, symptomatic chronic heart failure with left ventricular ejection fraction ≤ 35%, who are in sinus
rhythm with resting heart rate ≥ 70 beats per m...
